title: ice40 cells_sim.v: update clock enable behaviour based on hardware experiments

features.name: SB_IO DDR output with clock enable
features.description: Code should include an SB_IO primitive instantiation with PIN_TYPE set to DDR output mode, CLOCK_ENABLE and OUTPUT_CLK ports connected, and D_OUT_0/D_OUT_1 driving DDR data to PACKAGE_PIN

features.name: DFFE with separate posedge/negedge clock domains
features.description: Code should include a simulation model where one data flop is enabled by a clock enable signal on the positive clock edge, while a second data flop is enabled by a re-registered (pipeline-delayed) version of the same clock enable on the negative clock edge

features.name: behavioral pullup on unconnected enable signal
features.description: Code should include a behavioral pullup (assign to 1'b1 via pullup primitive or equivalent) on a clock enable signal that defaults to high when no external net is connected in the bitstream

features.name: clock enable gating affecting DDR output transitions
features.description: Code should include a testbench that exercises DDR output behavior under different clock enable activation orders -- enabling clock before vs after the first rising edge -- to verify that no output transitions occur when enable is inactive at the first clock edge
